title: hedeoma reverchonii var. serpyllifolia
intro: Hedeoma reverchonii var. serpyllifolia, also known as a variety of pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to repel mosquitoes and other insects, as well as its potential to ease menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. The health benefits of hedeoma reverchonii var. serpyllifolia include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and alleviate digestive issues.
